extension.summary: SoundCloud – Music and podcast streaming platform
SoundCloud – Plateforme de streaming musical et de podcasts
extension.description: SoundCloud ist eine Musik- und Podcast-Streaming-Plattform, mit der Du Millionen von Songs aus der ganzen Welt anhören kannst.
SoundCloud is a music and podcast streaming platform that lets you listen to millions of songs from around the world.
SoundCloud est une plateforme de streaming musical et de podcasts qui vous permet d'écouter des millions de titres du monde entier.
SoundCloud is een muziek- en podcaststreamingplatform waarmee je naar miljoenen nummers van over de hele wereld kunt luisteren.
extension.disclaimer: This plugin is not official, approved or endorsed by SoundCloud.
Ce plugin n'est pas officiel, approuvé ou soutenu par SoundCloud.
Deze plugin is niet officieel, goedgekeurd of gesteund door SoundCloud.
extension.news:
5.7.4 (2026-04-26) - hide music window flash When opening the addon from Music > Add-ons, Kodi briefly shows the music browser before our full-screen UI takes over. Now we call ReplaceWindow(home) right before launching the script, so the music window is replaced (not stacked) — the flash is invisible and Back from the UI goes straight to home instead of bouncing back to the music browser.
5.7.3 (2026-04-26) - diagnostic Logs detailed window/context info on every root call so we can identify why the widget/UI auto-detection fails on Arctic Zephyr Reloaded. Look for "ROOT context diag" lines in kodi.log.
5.7.2 (2026-04-26) - smart UI auto-launch Auto-detect whether the addon is being called by a skin home widget (data fetch — return a directory) or by the user clicking the addon (open the full UI). Detection is based on whether the Kodi Home screen is active. Fixes the regression where users had to click "▶ Open SoundCloud" every time after 5.7.1.
5.7.1 (2026-04-26) - widget compatibility fix Fixed: skin home widgets (Arctic Zephyr Reloaded, etc.) used to launch the full-screen UI when added — kicking the user out of their home screen. The addon root URL now returns a flat directory listing of widget shortcuts, so widgets show actual content. Users clicking on the addon from Kodi's add-on browser see a "▶ Open SoundCloud" entry as the first item to launch the full UI.
5.7.0 (2026-04-26) - simplification Removed the classic plugin-style menu — the full-screen UI is now the only interface. Removes 75 lines of code, the "Auto-launch" setting, the ?legacy=1 escape hatch and the /launch-ui/ route. Skin home widgets continue to work via the dedicated /widget/* routes (independent of the menu). The "Off" option in Widget mode now shows the full UI instead of the classic menu.
5.6.1 (2026-04-26) - widget mode for Arctic Zephyr Arctic Zephyr Reloaded only lets widgets point at the addon root, so the previous /widget/likes/ etc. routes weren't reachable through its UI. Added a "Widget mode" setting (Settings > Display > Skin home widget) that changes what the root returns. Pick Likes / Playlists / Following / Trending / Discover and the home widget will display that. Use ?legacy=1 to keep accessing the menu.
5.6.0 (2026-04-26) - skin widgets Added 5 widget shortcut routes that any skin can target as a flat directory: /widget/likes/, /widget/playlists/, /widget/following/, /widget/trending/, /widget/discover/. A new "Widgets" entry in the classic plugin menu lets you browse them from a skin's "Add Widget" picker. See the readme for the Arctic Zephyr Reloaded setup procedure.
5.5.14 (2026-04-25) - progress bar fix v3 Progress bar updater is now started AFTER the GUI is built (in onInit) instead of in __init__ — that's why no setWidth() calls were being made. Added explicit logging so we can verify the thread is running and the values are being computed. Look for "ProgressUpdater" lines in kodi.log.
5.5.13 (2026-04-25) - progress bar v3 Progress bar now resized directly via Python control.setWidth() instead of relying on $INFO[Window.Property] in XML width (which Kodi doesn't re-evaluate per frame). The orange fill image has a fixed XML id and the background thread calls setWidth() every 500ms with the computed pixel width. This works regardless of skin or audio format.
5.5.12 (2026-04-25) - custom progress bar Replaced the native Kodi progress bar (which was hijacked by Arctic Zephyr Reloaded's blue styling and frozen for HLS streams) with two stacked custom images. A background Python thread polls the player position every 500ms and updates the orange fill width via Window.Property. This fixes both the "always blue" and "never moves" issues at once.
5.5.11 (2026-04-25) Time/Duration labels in the mini-player are now wider, brighter (white instead of grey), and use a bigger font (font12) so 1:23:45-style timestamps display fully without truncation Removed unnecessary border attributes from progress bar that were causing rendering issues on some skins (orange.png is now a flat 1x1 pixel that Kodi stretches reliably)
NOTE: if the progress bar still doesn't move, check Settings > Playback > Audio format — set it to "Standard stable (MP3 progressive)" rather than "Standard adaptive (MP3 HLS)". HLS streams can prevent Player.Progress from updating on some Kodi builds.
5.5.10 (2026-04-25) Updated readme.md with the new v5 interface description and a corrected, step-by-step OAuth token procedure (using the Authorization header, with explicit warnings about the cookie pitfall)
5.5.9 (2026-04-25) Added TheWorms as a contributor (visible in Kodi's add-on info screen)
5.5.8 (2026-04-25) - progress bar fix Fixed progress bar showing as fully filled and frozen: switched midtexture to use 9-patch border rendering and added explicit empty lefttexture/righttexture/overlaytexture so Kodi correctly interpolates the fill width Resized orange.png from 4x4 to 8x8 so it survives the border="2" 9-patch slicing Progress bar now shows in SoundCloud orange (#FF5500) and updates in real-time as the track plays
5.5.7 (2026-04-25) Fixed: changes to OAuth token (or any setting) now take effect immediately without needing to restart Kodi The Settings class now creates a fresh xbmcaddon.Addon() instance on every read, bypassing Kodi's in-memory cache that was hiding the new value Auto-reset of the "token invalid" flag when the user changes the token — no more stuck 401 state after a paste
5.5.6 (2026-04-24) - diagnostic "Test OAuth token" now shows the actual error body from SoundCloud (not just the HTTP code), and logs the full request + response details to kodi.log for debugging.
5.5.5 (2026-04-24) OAuth token cleaning is now much more aggressive: strips ALL whitespace and non-printable characters anywhere in the token (not just leading/trailing). Catches Windows clipboard \r\n, zero-width spaces, BOM, etc. that were silently breaking authentication. "Test OAuth token" now displays a token preview (length + first/last chars) so you can verify the paste was clean.
5.5.4 (2026-04-24) Rewrote "How to get a token" help text — now correctly recommends the Authorization HTTP header (not the cookie). The cookie method silently fails, which is what was causing persistent 401 errors.
5.5.3 (2026-04-24) After closing SoundCloud (Back), now go straight to Kodi home instead of bouncing back to the Music files / add-ons window OAuth token field auto-strips "OAuth " or "Bearer " prefix if pasted by mistake (and surrounding quotes)
5.5.2 (2026-04-24) Added "Test OAuth token" button in Settings > Account, right below the token field — verifies the token by calling /me and shows your username on success Optimized /me handling: when the token is known invalid, skip the call entirely instead of doing 2 round-trips per UI page
5.5.1 (2026-04-24) Fixed cascade of HTTP 401 errors on public endpoints when an OAuth token is expired/invalid: the API now drops the bad token after the first 401 and retries anonymously, so charts/discover/trending keep working until the user updates the token
5.5.0 (2026-04-24) - settings reorganization Settings reorganized into 3 user-friendly categories: Display / Playback / Account Audio format options renamed to friendlier labels (Light Opus / Standard adaptive MP3 / Standard stable MP3) "Tracks per page" replaces the old "Search items size" wording (used by both search and pagination) Advanced API options (custom Client-ID, locale, search history size) moved to Expert level (use Kodi's Settings level slider to see them)
5.4.1 (2026-04-24) Fixed first card of each row being clipped on the left Fixed orange focus border persisting on rows that no longer have focus (now only the focused row shows the orange highlight) Fixed mini-player buttons rendering as empty squares (replaced Unicode chars with ASCII) Fixed progress bar showing in cyan instead of orange (dedicated orange texture instead of colordiffuse)
5.4.0 (2026-04-24) Home now has 4 configurable rows (Likes / Trending / Playlists / Following) in a vertically scrollable container Each row can be configured/reordered/disabled in Settings > Home rows Added pagination: pages now show a "Next page" item at the end when there are more results Page size honors the existing "Items per page" setting Selection now follows the playing track when autoplay moves to the next song Mini-player has a new "Compact" mode (cover + title + wide progress bar, no controls) Progress bar made thicker (8px) and properly themed in SoundCloud orange
5.3.0 (2026-04-24) Removed "Classic interface" button from sidebar — switching back to the classic UI is now done via Settings > Interface > "Use the new interface" toggle (turn it off) Sidebar now has 6 buttons: Home, Search, Likes, My playlists, Following, Settings
5.2.3 (2026-04-24) Fixed all addon-localized labels using $ADDON[plugin.audio.soundcloud XXXXX] instead of $LOCALIZE[XXXXX] (which was looking up Kodi core strings, not ours) Widened sidebar from 180px to 240px so French labels like "Vos abonnements" and "Interface classique" fit without truncation
5.2.2 (2026-04-24) DIAGNOSTIC: hardcoded sidebar labels (no $LOCALIZE) to determine why text was invisible
5.2.1 (2026-04-24) Fixed all text being invisible in the new UI (sidebar buttons, page titles, mini-player labels): removed broken custom Font.xml and switched to Kodi's standard font names guaranteed by every skin
5.2.0 (2026-04-24) Added auto-play next track: clicking a track now queues all visible tracks so Kodi plays them in sequence Added "Auto-play next track" toggle in Settings > Interface (on by default)
5.1.4 (2026-04-24) Fixed sidebar buttons appearing as solid white blocks (removed broken transparent texture) Fixed last sidebar button being cut off by the mini-player (tightened vertical layout)
5.1.3 (2026-04-24) Fixed sidebar text being invisible (explicit text positioning + better focus contrast)
5.1.2 (2026-04-24) Fixed playback interruption caused by a window reload loop after auto-launching the new UI Added re-entrancy guard to prevent stacking multiple WindowXML instances Made focus assignment defensive (no more "Control X cannot focus" warnings)
5.1.1 (2026-04-24) Fixed audio decoder crash when SoundCloud transcoding URLs expire (now properly tells Kodi to skip the track instead of feeding it a None path) Improved logging when stream URL resolution fails
5.1.0 (2026-04-24) New full-screen interface (V2): sidebar navigation, horizontal carousel rows, mini-player with controls Auto-launches by default — disable in Settings > Interface Layout (rows-only or sidebar+rows) and mini-player mode (off/display/controls) configurable in Settings Classic plugin still accessible via plugin://plugin.audio.soundcloud/?legacy=1 for widgets and fallback
5.0.3 (2026-04-24) Fixed 404 on Mon profil sub-menus: api-v2 doesn't expose /me/* sub-resources, now resolves user_id via /me and uses /users/{id}/* paths
5.0.2 (2026-04-24) Fixed crash on empty/non-JSON API responses (was crashing /me/* with JSONDecodeError on auth failure) HTTP errors and empty bodies now return an empty collection and log a clear warning instead of crashing 401/403 responses now properly trigger the "OAuth token invalid or expired" notification
5.0.1 (2026-04-24) Fixed authenticated /me/* endpoints returning empty collections (no client_id when authenticated) Fixed likes/reposts/playlist-likes envelope unwrapping for authenticated endpoints
4.3.0 (2026-04-24) Added experimental full-screen UI (WindowXML script) with horizontal track carousel and mini-player Launch via "New interface (beta)" from the root menu, or via RunScript(plugin.audio.soundcloud)
4.2.0 (2026-04-24) Added optional OAuth token login to access likes, playlists, following and reposts Added French translation Added proper content types per view (songs/albums/artists) so skins pick the right layout Added per-item fanart (artwork for tracks/playlists, profile banners for artists) Added sort methods on song views (title, artist, duration, playcount) Improved playlist and artist metadata (track count, follower count, mediatype) Fixed crash on tracks without a display_date
4.1.0 (2025-10-06) Fixed error when using addon Added description and follower-counts to user profiles Added description and likes to playlists Added playcount to tracks Updated Dutch translations
4.0.2 (2022-03-13) Fixed random CloudFront errors when sending requests Added context-menu option for removing search-history items
4.0.1 (2021-11-02) Fixed error in "Discover"-folder
4.0.0 (2020-12-12) Added support for Kodi v19 (Matrix)
